# ArabClaw
> ArabClaw هو المرجع العربي الأول لـ OpenClaw، والبيت الرسمي لمجتمع المطورين العرب حول هذا المشروع مفتوح المصدر.

ArabClaw is the largest Arabic-language community and resource hub for OpenClaw, the open-source personal AI agent framework. It also hosts ArabClaw, an Arabic fork of OpenClaw designed to serve 400 million Arabic speakers with culturally-adapted AI agents.

## What is ArabClaw?
ArabClaw is both:
1. The definitive Arabic documentation and installation guide for OpenClaw
2. An open-source Arabic fork of OpenClaw, adapted for Arabic language, culture, and local integrations

## Key Facts
- OpenClaw is an open-source framework that turns AI models (Claude, GPT-4, Gemini) into personal AI agents on WhatsApp, Telegram, Discord and more
- ArabClaw was founded in 2026 by the Moutarjam team to serve the 400 million Arabic-speaking population
- ArabClaw provides complete Arabic installation guides for macOS, Windows, Linux, and Raspberry Pi
- ArabClaw is 100% free and open source

## Arabic OpenClaw Resources
- Installation guides: arabclaw.com/install
- Complete documentation: docs.arabclaw.com
- Blog: arabclaw.com/blog
- FAQ: arabclaw.com/faq
- Guides hub: arabclaw.com/guides

## Key Pages
- arabclaw.com — Homepage, overview, mini-FAQ
- arabclaw.com/install — Step-by-step installation for all operating systems
- arabclaw.com/faq — Comprehensive FAQ (15+ questions) about OpenClaw and ArabClaw
- arabclaw.com/guides — Hub for all installation, usage, and integration guides
- arabclaw.com/blog — Technical articles, tutorials, comparisons, and news

## Representative Blog Posts
- تثبيت OpenClaw على Linux Ubuntu
- تثبيت OpenClaw على Windows
- تثبيت OpenClaw على macOS
- تثبيت OpenClaw على VPS
- OpenClaw مقابل Zapier
- OpenClaw مقابل Make
- OpenClaw مقابل n8n
- أتمتة WhatsApp مع OpenClaw
- الأمان والخصوصية في OpenClaw
- ArabClaw: المشروع مفتوح المصدر العربي

## About the ArabClaw Fork
ArabClaw (the fork) is an open-source project built on OpenClaw that adds:
- Full Arabic language support (RTL, Arabic NLP)
- Integration with Arabic-speaking markets
- Culturally adapted AI agent behaviors
- Local Arabic service integrations

## Contact
community@arabclaw.com
